name: VOC Energy Trust
summary: PART I . General VOC Energy Trust (the Trust) was formed in November2010 by VOC Brazos Energy Partners, L.P. (VOC Brazos). Much of the information disclosed in this Form 10-K has been provided to the Trust by VOC Brazos, including information associated with the Underlying Properties (as defined below) such as production and well counts, major producing areas, customer relationships, competition, marketing and post-production services, and certain information on which reserve data is based.
